Using `SUBJECT.fields()` selects all columns from the Subject table, which can lead to unnecessary data transfer and maintenance issues if the table schema changes. Instead, explicitly list only the columns needed for the query.

Using `fields()` on both SUBJECT and STUDENT tables selects all columns from both tables, which retrieves potentially unnecessary data and creates tight coupling to the table schemas. Explicitly specify only the required columns from each table.
